tools.name: scan_python_repo
tools.description: Scan a Python repository and return Python files with line counts and sizes.

path.description: Path to a Python repository or Python file.

tools.name: summarize_python_file
tools.description: Summarize a Python file using AST: functions, classes, decorators, and key Agent-related calls.

tools.name: read_code_excerpt
tools.description: Read a code excerpt with line numbers.

tools.name: extract_agent_features
tools.description: Extract evidence for tools schema, tool invocation, agent loop, subagent interaction, and Skills/MCP extension from a Python Agent repo.

path.description: Path to a Python Agent repository or Python file.

tools.name: explain_agent_feature
tools.description: Delegate focused explanation of an Agent feature to a code-reading subagent.

feature.description: Feature to explain, such as tool invocation or subagent interaction.
